title: swertia perennis subsp. covillei
intro: Swertia perennis subsp. covillei, also known as Coville's Swertia, is a subspecies of plant in the gentian family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant contains bioactive compounds with various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against cell damage. Coville's Swertia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
